title: athyrium esculentum
intro: Athyrium esculentum, also known as the Ostrich Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fern family (Thelypteridaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium esculentum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve digestion. Athyrium esculentum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, and its young fiddleheads are edible and can be used in salads.
